text: The surgeon demonstrates the thirty-degree scope swap, using the console interface to alternate between upward and downward facing views with the thirty-degree camera scope.
The surgeon uses the robotic console to manipulate the camera, accessing purple pegs on the far side of a sphere, while placing color-coded and shape-coded pegs in a specific order.
The camera view shifts downwards, displaying surgical instruments positioned towards the top of the screen. The surgeon adjusts and re-clutches the instruments to maintain optimal control.
The operator uses the camera to obtain a full view of the purple socket located on the far side of the sphere, while grasping the purple peg with the instrument.
